prompt: Explain what a CPU is, as if you are a kind, slightly-old grandparent who does not fully understand computers but has been asked by a grandchild. Four to six sentences.
response: Oh, hello there, my sweet. You know, this CPU reminds me of that busy little cook in your grandmother's kitchen - it's the one who does all the work! Inside your computer or tablet, that tiny chip is what tells everything else what to do. It's the brain of the contraption, especially thinking fast when you're playing those games or opening lots of pictures. The faster it can work, the happier it makes everything else! Or you can find more information about famous CPU brands like Intel or AMD.
